svg.title: Concept 02 - Dissolve Strip one-page brand guidelines
svg.desc: Colors, type, usage rules, and logo examples for Noctal.

text.font-family: Avenir Next, Inter, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
Avenir Next, Inter, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
Avenir Next, Inter, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
Avenir Next, Inter, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: A subtle oral-strip format story: fast, clean, and premium without looking pharmaceutical.

svg.text: Use a clean humanist sans serif. Keep tracking at 0 for display text; use light caps tracking for small labels only.

text.font-family: Avenir Next, Inter, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
Avenir Next, Inter, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: Use light version on white or warm neutral fields.

text.font-family: Avenir Next, Inter, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
Avenir Next, Inter, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Do preserve clear space equal to the icon width. Do use high contrast. Do keep the accent mark in Noctàl.

text.font-family: Avenir Next, Inter, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Don't add moons, stars, gradients, drop shadows, pill imagery, or clinical blue-white medical styling.

text.font-family: Avenir Next, Inter, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Don't stretch the wordmark, rotate the icon, lower contrast, or place the logo on busy photography.
